message:
feat(abi): add 33 Tier 5 symbols — xattr, PTY, crypt, pthread spin/barrier, dl_iterate_phdr

Deep expansion across specialized subsystems:
- Extended attributes (RawSyscall): getxattr, setxattr, listxattr, removexattr,
  fgetxattr, fsetxattr, flistxattr, fremovexattr
- Misc Linux (RawSyscall): mincore, posix_fadvise, readahead, syncfs, sync
- PTY (GlibcCallThrough): openpty, login_tty, forkpty, grantpt, unlockpt,
  ptsname, posix_openpt
- crypt: crypt
- dlfcn: dl_iterate_phdr, dladdr
- pthread: spin_init/destroy/lock/trylock/unlock, barrier_init/destroy/wait,
  setname_np, getname_np

Totals: 771 exported (387 Implemented, 205 RawSyscall, 179 GlibcCallThrough)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
